programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1

programme.title: The Hunger Games

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: World leaders targeted at London funeral; only one bodyguard can stop it.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A group of bank robbers find their multi-million dollar plan interrupted by a hard-boiled detective.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Factory worker Douglas Quaid visits a company that can turn dreams into real memories. Thinking that memories of life as a superspy are just the ticket, Quaid undergoes the procedure. When something goes wrong, he must team up with a rebel fighter on a search to find the head of the underground resistance and take down the leader of the free world.

programme.title: Close Encounters Of The Third Kind (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: We are not alone... A line worker, after an encounter with UFO s, feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: An unemployed engineer takes a job as a teacher of hostile and rebellious students in their last year at a high school in London's tough East End.

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand s debut film won her the Academy Award for her performance as singer-comediene, Fanny Brice. Nominated for seven other awards, this classic musical film contrasts Fanny s onstage antics with her offstage romance with dashing gambler, Nicky Arnstein (Omar Shariff).

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town to make his "farewell" television performance and kiss his biggest fan before he is drafted.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: The Commitments
programme.desc: Jimmy Rabbitte, an unemployed Dublin boy, decides to put together a soul band made up entirely of the Irish working class.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization, Part II: The Metal Years
programme.desc: The second in Penelope Spheeris’ trilogy, The Metal Years takes a fast-paced look at the outrageous Heavy Metal scene of the late '80s. Set in Los Angeles, the film explores fascinating portraits of struggling musicians, fans and star-struck groupies. Featuring Alice Cooper, Ozzy Osbourne, Poison and members of Aerosmith, Kiss, and Motorhead as well as performances by Megadeath, Faster Pussycat, Lizzy Borden, London, Odin and Seduce, this raucous and entertaining chapter also chronicles the lonely naiveté of the striving bands, the endless flow of alcohol and drugs and the relentless sexism.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Brady Hawkes, The Gambler, receives a letter from his son indicating he needs help. This sends Brady to the rescue.

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: After a terrible boating accident killed her family, shy Angela Baker is sent to Camp Arawak. Shortly after her arrival a series of bizarre and violent "accidents" begin to claim the lives of various campers.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades

programme.desc: A scattered marketing exec helps rebrand a bootcamp and discovers its strict owner may be just what she needs.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: The Moon is in Aquarius
programme.desc: On a starry night lit by an Aquarius full moon, Devante and Liz collide at a house party in San Francisco. The spark is instant-and impossible to ignore. Ditching the crowd, they embark on a spontaneous journey through the city's winding streets, iconic views, and hidden gems. With every laugh and shared secret, their bond deepens. But is this love story bound by time-do they only have until dawn?

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: Nothing Even Matters
programme.desc: Paroled after 5 years for a victimless crime, Travis is taken in by an acquaintance, Benny, and her mother. Their generosity turns into a life of crime and murder. As he falls for a woman named Bear, Travis must escape the web of secrets and lies he's trapped in, fighting for survival and the love he's found.

programme.title: Priceless: The Score
programme.desc: After starting their new record label, Donica Blair and Shequell Harris have entered a dangerous arena full of guns, lies, and deceit. Now they are racing against time to right their wrongs and save their own lives before they are next in a string of murders. Meanwhile their partner Seven, has fallen victim to the deadliest of them all; the Black widow.

programme.title: Loyalty and Larceny
programme.desc: Broke couple Deon and Tiff accidentally steal a package of premium weed meant for a local dealer working under Queen Pin. Forced to become rookie dealers in Dallas to pay off their debt, they fumble their way through the drug game while trying to survive the ruthless Queen Pin and a vengeful rival, C-Mo. When they uncover a deeper betrayal, they must fight for their lives and a shot at running their own LA empire.

programme.title: Queens of Dope City
programme.desc: Joselyn, Kendra and Alicia are partners in a rideshare service they have created together, but are struggling financially to maintain the business. One day Joselyn gives a man named Donte a ride who presents her with an opportunity to keep the business going. Things then begin to spiral out of control when they soon are chased down from the law, and must escape Donte.

programme.title: Deadly Squatters
programme.desc: Eugene and Laura return home from vacation to find that two young siblings have taken up residence in their home, and have now claimed legal rights as squatters. Forced to share their home with two strangers, they must play their wicked games and survive psychological terror as the legal system takes its time.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc must spirit walk to save the Chief of the Water Keepers and get the water flowing to Newmerica.

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: A team starts its journey to transport the only survivor of the zombie virus from NY to California.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: In need of gas, the team follows a suspicious stranger to an oil refinery packed with zombies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Out to get Cassandra back, her bizarre and dangerous “family” of cannibals catches up with the team.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Citizen Z directs the team to a rumored helicopter controlled by a mysterious General.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: A tornado forces the team to Warren’s hometown where she searches for her husband.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends Ben, the rat leader of the swarm of rats trained by Willard Stiles from the original film Willard. Ben becomes the boy's best friend, protecting him from bullying and keeping his spirits up in the face of a heart condition. However, things gradually take a downward turn as Ben's swarm becomes violent, resulting in several deaths.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live Birdemic
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to one of our favorite bad movies of all time! - Live! Shot Live from the Belcourt Theater in Nashville, and beamed to over 600 theaters around the USA. There are solrpnls, bark beetles and animals such as seals! Plus, the show kicks off with everyones favorite lovable loser, Norman, in the short Norman Checks In. So grab a coat hanger, fire up your solar powered TV and for the love of god fully vest your stock options! Birdemic!

programme.title: Willow Creek (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A young couple find themselves face-to-face against a terrifying evil when they venture into the heart of Bigfoot country in WILLOW CREEK, director Bobcat Goldthwaits (God Bless America, Worlds Greatest Dad) unique spin on the horror genre. Looking to make a splash online with his research videos into the existence of Bigfoot, Jim (Bryce Johnson, Pretty Little Liars) and his girlfriend Kelly take a camping trip to the small town of Willow Creek, California, and the surrounding mountains where the infamous footage of the supposed sasquatch was filmed. But before long the headstrong couple gets lost in the woods and discovers that someone or something is stalking them. With each night bringing with it unknowable dangers, the two must now use all of their cunning to try to make it out of the forest alive.

programme.title: Creeping Death
programme.desc: Halloween was always Tims favorite holidayuntil his mother was diagnosed with brain cancer. Now, all he wants is a quiet night in. That is quickly disrupted when his friends pay him an unwanted visit, after stealing a mysterious sack from the doorstep of a local crazy. This sacrilegious act unleashes the Aos Si, a Celtic spirit that walks the Earth on Halloween. They must band together and survive the night or make the ultimate offeringtheir lives--this Halloween, all who trick are treats.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: An easy job turns into a struggle for survival for a HVAC repair man. Stuck to the roof, he must escape before night falls and the real horror begins.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A horror novelist's agent offers him help overcoming his writer's block, and the struggling author can't resist. Then, Richard's wife is attacked and becomes a shell of the woman he loved. He'll do anything to help her feel better.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Lyle is a disappointment, and when his parents meddle in his life and their plan backfires, he must deal with the aftermath. Then, Marcia takes her stepdaughter to her grandmother's house to claim their inheritance, and nothing can stand in her way.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: The Belaskos get more than they bargained for when they move in next door to a vampire-hating suburbanite. Then, a father and son bond by playing an old video game, but soon find out there's a reason it was abandoned.

programme.title: Creepshow

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone (Bruce Bennett) battles Shawnee warriors as he leads a band of settlers into Kentucky in this frontier potboiler from Albert C. Gannaway Productions. Made at the height of Hollywood's fascination with pioneer days, the film also stars Lon Chaney Jr. as Chief Blackfish, and country singer Faron Young as a handsome young suitor for Boone's daughter. There's plenty of action and danger here as the Shawnee are convinced that Boone is trying to steal their land. But Boone is ready, not even fearing death by tomahawk. It isn't how you die, Boone says. It's what you live for.

programme.title: Buffalo Stampede
programme.desc: A big time cast, including Randolph Scott, Buster Crabbe, Barton MacLane, and Harry Carey star in this feature about stampedes, Indian attacks, and plundering thieves! Directed by the esteemed Henry Hathaway (True Grit, Niagara).

programme.title: The Lucky Texan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western. He and George Gabby Hayes strike it rich with a gold mine, only to find their lives complicated by women and crooked officials. Things get even messier when the good guys are framed for murder! Its all action here, particularly since legendary stuntman Yakima Cannut stars as one of the films heavies. Who will win the fight over the gold and the girl? Directed by Robert N. Bradbury for Monogram Pictures. Also starring Barbara Sheldon. (The film was also known as Gold Strike River.)

programme.title: The Trail Beyond
programme.desc: Rod Drew (John Wayne) is in search of a missing miner and his daughter in this Lone Star Picture. Along the way, Drew rescues his pal Wabbi (Noah Beery Jr.) from card cheats who have framed him for murder. You'll find plenty of action and suspense in this vintage horse opera, originally distributed by the kings of the B western, Monogram Pictures!

programme.title: Riders of Destiny
programme.desc: John Wayne sings! Well, not really. His voice was dubbed here, but as Singin Sandy Saunders hes still able to write the code of justice with a blazing sixgun! Hes a government agent out to help a group of ranchers in their battle with a villain who is tying up local water rights. Also starring Gabby Hayes, Al St. John, Yakima Canutt, and Cecilia Parker, Riders of Destiny was filmed early in Waynes career it was his first for Lone Star but the unmistakable swagger is already in place!

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks

programme.title: Broken Arrow

When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Unaware that the Civil War has ended, Col. John Henry Thomas (John Wayne) successfully attacks a Confederate company led by James Langdon (Rock Hudson). With the remnants of Langdon's squadron fleeing to Mexico, Thomas and his adopted Native American son, Blue Boy (Roman Gabriel), gather a herd of horses and head for the border with their company, to sell them. After Langdon's caravan is captured by a Mexican general (Tony Aguilar), Thomas nobly sacrifices the horses to free them.

programme.title: Local Knowledge

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: With the drastic changes in the Southern California fishery over the past several years, it has been easy to get fixated on targeting large Bluefin tuna and going all out on what many have coined "big fish" fishing. On this episode Ali and Rush take advantage of the many other opportunities this time of year has to offer and switch focus back to the basics, targeting smaller yellowfin, bluefin, and mahi on bait.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Women appreciate creative input; Men appreciate silence. All bets are off when a big American network eyes the Lodge and wants to make some minor changes to the show.

programme.title: The Red Green Show

programme.title: The Red Green Show

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: The Lodge leans over as it sinks into the ground.

programme.desc: The men steal the neighbors' grapes to make their own wine.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Harold and Bonnie get married at the Lodge, with Red as minister.

programme.title: Adventures With Bill
programme.desc: Bill ditches modern convenience in favor of giant backpacks, leaf-clearing contraptions, and cheese made from who-knows-what. Whether he's storing food in the woods or demonstrating pick-pocketing as a “survival skill,” it’s off-the-grid living, Possum Lodge style.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: There's a running shoe in the recipe.

programme.title: The Red Green Show
programme.desc: Helmut destroys the lodge's canoe.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Daniel Cutler, chef and co-owner of RONAN LA, makes the "NEW ENGLAND-GREEK-SYTLE SPICY CHOMPER PIZZA" that he made for the PIZZA NIGHT episode of Recipe Club

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Kiano Moju, the author of one of last year’s biggest cookbooks, AfriCali, stopped by the studio to show us how to make her fantastic PASSION FRUIT & LIME PIE that was the winning recipe from the MIDNIGHT SNACK episode of Recipe Club! Make this, pop it in the freezer, give yourself a whipped cream shot straight from the can, and bask in the accolades you receive from anyone you choose to share with.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Head chef at Lasita in LA, Nico de Leon, stopped by the studio to make his winning recipe from the EASTER episode of Recipe Club: Lechon Cebuano.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Courtney McBroom, former culinary director of Milk Bar, culinary consultant on Apple TV’s Lessons in Chemistry, and founder of Ruined Table (amongst many other things!) stopped by the kitchen to make her Recipe Club-winning dish: Texas-Style Smoked Brisket Nachos! They are easy, delicious, and will make everyone at your party very happy.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Bryan Ford, Recipe Club legend and baker, makes this recipe from Ottolenghi for pancakes with maple brown butter apples and sesame praline.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: From Scott Clark of Dad's Luncheonette (and former chef de cuisine of the three-Michelin-star Saison in San Francisco), a homemade Oreo that we can actually get behind. Generally we stand opposed to trying to recreate perfect foods like ketchup or Oreos. We thought this was gonna be a moon pie masquerading as an Oreo. But no, this rules. Crispy, crunchy, addictively satisfying.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Bernie’s has turned a simple frozen dessert into a new LA classic: the granita with toasted meringue. Chef Jon Berne layers bright, icy fruit with a cloud of brûléed meringue on top — part snow cone, part pie topping, part pure summertime magic. In this episode, he takes us behind the counter to show how this deceptively simple treat became a Smorgasburg obsession, one spoonful at a time.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: There are breakfast burritos, and then there’s Macheen’s breakfast burrito — a tortilla wrapped around the imagination of chef Jonathan Pérez and his sister, Ana. Birria and swiss, longanisa, and crispy pork belly breakfast burritos are the true stars at Macheen. In this episode, they show us how their spin on the classics has turned into one of Smorgasburg’s most talked-about stalls.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Dominic Cagliero didn’t set out to be a pitmaster. He was an Army vet who fell in love with barbecue the long, hard way: hours tending a fire, obsessing over smoke, figuring out how to make brisket bend without breaking. Full Send is the result — a Filipino-Texan fusion BBQ stall at Smorgasburg LA where the energy feels less like a business and more like a backyard party.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: At Lobsterdamus, family is everything. The Reyes family set out to change the way LA thinks about lobster — not boiled but split in half, grilled over mesquite, and dripping with butter. What started as a family vision has become one of Smorgasburg’s signature stalls, proving lobster doesn’t need fine dining to feel unforgettable.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Yazeed “Yaz” Soudani’s Jordanian-style shawarma popped out of a backyard and turned Smorgasburg LA into his laboratory. Think juicy chicken marinated in spices from Amman, fresh saj bread, beef-tallow-fried fries, and a “Yaz way” that’s equal parts garlic kick + pomegranate molasses. Chef Yaz takes us through his journey to Smorgasburg and shares what's next.

programme.title: Wide World of Cooking
programme.desc: Darwin Wai’s Thai-inspired gelato business flips the script on dessert. Instead of sugar cones and sprinkles, he’s serving bold flavors like Thai basil, cold brew Thai tea, and strawberry-balsamic, sometimes scooped right on top of coconut sticky rice. At Smorgasburg LA, Moom Maam has become the stall that keeps diners cool, curious, and always coming back to see what unexpected flavor Darwin will churn out next.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom head to Verbier, one of the world’s most exclusive ski resorts, for a sprinkling of wintery magic and cheese. A lot of cheese. They try Europe’s highest fondue in an igloo on the summit of the Mont-Fort, eat raclette prepared by a robot and learn to bake bread the traditional way in one of the few remaining communal ovens in Switzerland.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don’t need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we’re all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There’s a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today’s show celebrates seafood we can eat because it’s fished in a way that’s humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques celebrates birthdays, anniversaries and holidays with special meals. It’s when he splurges on caviar, oysters, even truffles–the ultimate extravagance. These occasions are a time to gather together around the table with family and friends and indulge in our favorite foods and wines.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: When the weather heats up it’s time for family dishes that work on the grill or in the pan. Jacques' great summer menu with Asparagus in Butter Sauce, a Grilled Steak with Zucchini, topped with Anchovy Butter, Curly Dogs for the kids. He shows you classic ways to cut potatoes and ends with a Patriotic Raspberry and Blueberry Galette.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom explore Kyushu, the most southerly of the Japanese main islands. They master the art of making the world famous Tonkotsu Ramen, fashion their own sushi knives with the help of a blacksmith who ordinarily has an eight-year waiting list for his product, and participate in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.desc: Mar takes Mary Alice—new to Westport—and he just sold her a new condo. He takes her through his Casual Luxury transformation of her new condo step-by-step. Remove walls? Check! Add rooms? Check! Take some risks? Check! A total renovation that requires many hands—and dancing feet—to get to the finish line. But what will she think?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 2: Mar lets down the drawbridge to show you the big reveal! Mar heads back to the castle to check the progress, and for the grand tour of the final results. His 6 Casual Luxury design principles were the owners' guide, and they definitely work in every time period! Watch this distressed property find it's "happily ever after"! (It's a Wow!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 1: Mar gets a phone call from another time period. The new owners of an honest-to-goodness castle want to restore and renovate their new property using Mar's 6 Casual Luxury design principles as a guide. It could be a Margical makeover of this hidden-away treasure, but there is a lot of work to do. Mar meets the enthusiastic family and learns their era-honoring plans.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Think small! Small spaces are the new big trend in design. Mar is the master of small space transformation - and shows how it can be applied by staging 2 very different spaces: a small cape style home and a newly constructed apartment complex, both in downtown Westport, CT. You won’t believe how spacious these small footprint Casual Luxury reveals are.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Oops! Can't believe we did that. Yikes! We're going to show you anyway. New! Behind the scenes footage you've never seen. Regular episodes get full fast. (And it's not always smooth sailing.) This fan-favorite episode is stuffed with things you've never seen. Behind-the-scenes & reveals; slip-ups & bloopers & outright embarrassing mistakes. Casual Luxury never looked so, well, casual!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: 4 seasons. 4 apartments. 1 building full of design. Watch these Margical makeovers of 4 different apartments. Mar gets challenged to bring 4 new spaces to life-but without any renovation! Watch him take the 4 seasons as inspiration for the 4 apartments. And thanks to help from Ethan Allen these new apartments inspire everyone who visits. Will your favorite be Fall, Winter, Spring or Summer?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This 4-part home makeover is ready for its grand finale (and a party!) All the areas that the new owners and their guests will use and see every day are done-so the stakes are high! All the modern technological touches call for a special reveal. So Mar throws a party-and has his own surprises waiting for his guests, too. It's Casual Luxury come to life!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The big renovation of Greystone is at the turning point: time for Mar to turn his attention to creating or updating 4 bedrooms-each with their own en suite! No detail is too small to make it happen: move windows, closets, hallways-heck, move everything! It's a down-to-the-studs approach that he hopes will really pay off. Plus: Mar MC’s a charity dance competition & takes the stage with celebs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Renovation continues: Despite the extent of the work needed, the walls start to come down and a brand new, state-of-the-art home begins to rise in its place. There are a lot of moving parts to keep track of. The first completely finished rooms? 4 completely renovated bathrooms. Taking all 4 from down-to-the-studs to spa-like havens is no easy task but the results are Marvellous.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Learning about Greystone: With Mar's own home's projects finally complete, it's time for him to get on to the newest big-scale project. Paul has cooked up a surprise: a wonderful new renovation project at a home called Greystone. It needs to be completely overhauled so its true potential can shine. But Paul hasn't told Mar everything and there is quite an unexpected discovery awaiting him.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It’s definitely fireplace weather in New England, and Mar has got that covered—outdoors, too! While Mar’s colleague Paul is away on business, Mar goes into overdrive to transform Rosebrook Gardens. And local resources pull together to make it happen. New windows and doors, terrace, fire pit, furniture, and landscaping. It’s a transformation no one could have expected, especially Paul.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Will Mar's design dreams go up in smoke? With some spare time between projects, Mar turns his attention to his own home, Rosebrook Gardens. This time: updating and reworking an entire side of the house: fireplace, mantel, hearth & chimney. Plus new patio, landscaping, outdoor furnishings & accessories. In a twist, Mar hands off the final reveal to Team Mar, will it be up to standards?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It might be Fall in New England, but Mar makes it easy to get in the swim of things! This incredible backyard makeover & reveal will make you (and the makeover family) smile from ear to ear. A year in the making, its a transformation you won't want to miss. But after Mar plays a reporter in a shark attack movie will you be afraid to go back in the water? Watch him film it and find out!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Meet the Breslin family, new to Fairfield CT, and their fixer-upper back yard and guest cottage. Mar thinks he's all set after they move in to the main house, but when he agrees to work on their outdoor living spaces he has no idea what he's in for. But the transformation leaves them amazed. Plus: Mar does a little free-falling without a parachute.

programme.desc: Savanah is looking for a home in Park City, Utah to escape from her LA lifestyle.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A modern home built out of flint, a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. A tree house getaway.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore a palatial cliff-top villa. And then uncover a retreat built into rocks.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore a 2000 square metre, grid shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker in the UK.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin. In Sardinia, a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore an enchanting villa. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin. A family retreat embedded in the desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake. A cabin perched on a river. And a modern mirrored house.

programme.title: Taste Hunters
programme.desc: Switzerland is famous for its sumptuous chocolate, its reliable banking system, and its luxury watches. If you look closer, however, you will find that its pristine lakes, mountains, and valleys are nothing short of extraordinary.

programme.title: Taste Hunters
programme.desc: Scotland's moorlands and lochs hold age-old legends. Its atmosphere is peculiar, and yet very beautiful. Traditionally famous for its sheep, pubs, and whisky, Scotland is home to people who are choosing more sustainable food production.

programme.title: Taste Hunters
programme.desc: Sicily is an island steeped in history, culture, and agricultural production. Since antiquity, Sicily's inhabitants have mastered the exceptional resources of their land, including its rich soil that has benefited from volcanic curing.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: Life in the Iberian Peninsula is lush and varied. Learn how two opposing worlds were joined in a single territory that remained isolated by the Pyrenees Mountains. The results are a collection of forgotten places, exciting animals, and unique splendors.

programme.title: National Parks Revealed
programme.desc: Bask in luxurious getaways and rustic retreats that are almost as celebrated as the wondrous landscapes that surround them. The Old Faithful Inn in Yellowstone National Park, and the natural springs at the Furnace Creek Inn in Death Valley National Park are just two of the treasures you will visit.

programme.title: Under the Pole
programme.desc: Dive into the polar abyss of Greenland's fjords, testing the limits of man's ability to survive beneath Arctic waters. This expedition explores of 800 miles of Greenland's coasts, 450 Arctic dives, and researching over 1,000 scientific hypotheses with guidance by the local Inuit population.

programme.title: Green Tourism
programme.desc: Travel with Green Tourism to Jordan where a sublime “ecolodgical” experience awaits us in the heart of the desert. First, we will head to France where visitors can stay in cabins suspended in the trees, or that float on lakes like a dream.

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: The value of Earth's natural resources changes depending on to whom you speak. Meet people from France, Colombia, Vietnam, South Africa, the Philippines, and Michigan who have circumvented extraordinary challenges to protect the Earth.

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: What we take from and put back into the Earth reflects the very nature of who we are as human beings. Meet people from Washington, Liberia, Macedonia, the Cook Islands, Mongolia, and Chile who believe end results depend upon how we begin.

programme.title: Wild Life
programme.desc: Central America is a strip of land connecting two large land masses, a small region with an extraordinary natural richness. The Iberian Peninsula is the most bio-diverse region in Europe, acting as an umbilical cord between Africa and Europe. Both places are defined as "biological bridges."

programme.title: The Green Wave
programme.desc: Sao Tome and Principe are two African islands on the Equator that are striving for sustainability. Here, the inspiring work of environmentalists and local people are helping to establish balance between development and natural resources.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: In Abilene, Kan., Marshal Dan Mitchell (Randolph Scott) contends with unruly cattlemen and a group of determined homesteaders intending to settle on government land bordering the town. Hoping to rid the town of the farmers, the cowboys set fire to their camp, and a desperado murders a homesteader, but Dan refuses to allow them revenge. Joining a posse under a crooked sheriff, and with the help of singer Rita (Ann Dvorak) and a merchant, Dan forces a peaceful showdown between the factions.

programme.title: Barbarosa
programme.desc: In pre-Civil War Texas, naïve Karl Westover (Gary Busey) accidentally kills his brother-in-law, and heads to Mexico to escape the consequences. Along the way, he encounters Barbarosa (Willie Nelson), who is also on the run. Barbarosa teaches Karl survival skills for the desert -- and how to rob. In their journey from Texas to Mexico and back again, the two men are captured by outlaw Angel Morales, and pursued by Don Braulito (Gilbert Roland), who wants Barbarosa dead.

programme.title: Bandolero!
programme.desc: There is little hope for bandit Dee Bishop (Dean Martin) and his gang as they wait to be hanged. But at the last second, the hangman -- Dee's brother, Mace (James Stewart), in disguise -- helps them escape. After kidnapping a rancher's wife (Raquel Welch) and with the vengeful sheriff (George Kennedy) in pursuit, they retreat to an abandoned town. Tired of their desperado life, the brothers consider going straight. But when a gang of bandoleros attacks, their chances at starting over seem dim.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: For a decade, the white settlers and the Apaches have been engaged in a bloody war with no peaceful end in sight. When a white scout, Tom Jeffords (James Stewart), has a dangerously close but enlightening encounter with the natives, he begins to see the humanity in these enemies. Entering the Apache territory seeking peace, Jeffords forms a friendship with the Apache leader Cochise (Jeff Chandler), although there are people on both sides who resist extending the olive branch.

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While the World Spaceport celebrates Jimbo’s retirement, Jett faces a UFO and Space Monster, piloting World Robot as chaos erupts. The team unites, time freezes, and Jimbo reveals Megamon is an old friend, choosing to stay with everyone.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Super Wings liven up Xiang Xiang’s Tanghulu shop, rescuing everyone from a syrupy mess and drawing big crowds. In Dino World, the Dino Wings halt a Dinobase takeover and reunite a wandering pterosaur hatchling with its mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Floods and thunder strike Dino World but Trico overcomes his fear to help Jett and the Dino Wings rescue every dino with paper boats and planes. Later Noah and Mom’s dino costume adventure leads to a mix-up with real maiasauras, and families reunite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Paris, Jett and Curie shrink to save moles from a burst pipe during a wild croquet chase. Later, Jett and Sara help Princess Maribel when magical dress chaos erupts, restoring order so the party sparkles brighter than ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the moon, Jett and Curie outsmart dust storms and shield a spacecraft to help Kajsa ride her new bike. In Mexico’s Baja Desert, Jett and Marty clear boulders so Big Wheel can race again and roll to victory, powered by Super Wings spirit.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Munich, Jett and Marty foil Golden Boy and Girl’s wolf costume prank during Mila’s parade, saving everyone from a river dunk. Later in Singapore, Jett, Traver, and Lien’s robot dogs safely stop runaway giant fireworks, rescuing the festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Copenhagen, dinos escape through portals as Jett, Lucie, and Super Wings rescue a brachiosaur and guide everyone home. Across the globe, megabot Super Wings unite to send dinos back through swirling portals, saving the world together.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver inspire Xinyan with Kung Fu mastery, turning chopsticks into her winning move and calming a tiger. In snowy Norway, Jett and Sara stop runaway snowballs so Princess Hedda’s sleigh race ends in victory and laughter.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On a Bermuda Triangle island, Jett and Runi battle a junk monster and restore the beach for Kyle and his dad. Then in Chiang Mai, the team douses flames, reunites baby elephant Paya with her mom, and celebrates by filming their happy day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A cruise turns epic as Nako, with Super Wings and Traver’s time-freeze, saves the day from real pirates and earns his pirate crown. In New York, a wild AR game sends monsters loose until Joseph, Jett, Curie, and friends team up for a heroic roundup.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuto’s festival dream comes true as his new wand helps him shine and calm an enchanted dragon with the Super Wings. Later on Mars, the team helps Sam and Buddy collect rainbow stones, halt a volcano, and treasure a magical yellow gleam.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy jet to Jeju, helping Taehoon’s robot save Grandma’s shellfish from a giant fish, then team up to free it. On Mars, Jett and Marty chase Roy's lost bags, while Jinga dazzles with an out-of-this-world tour.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy join Hazel and Runi in Australia to help animals escape wildfires, then fly to Seoul where tiny Antny enters the Strongest Bug Contest, faces rampaging rivals, and, with Super Wings’ upgrades, helps save the city.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Jingle Bells and More Christmas Songs - Junior Squad
programme.desc: Christmas is here with our favourite Christmas songs like Jingle bells, we wish you a Merry Christmas, 12 days of Christmas, Deck the halls, joy to the world, silent nights and more Christmas carols & music for kids and babies. Sing along with Junior Squad!

programme.title: Colors Song Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs - Loco Nuts Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Sing & Dance along to Baby Shark tune! Enjoy popular easy to learn kids songs for babies and toddlers. Loco Nuts Nursery Rhyme is a kids tv show where you can learn baby songs like five little babies, swimming song, animal dance song, dinosaur song, doctor song, boo boo song, yes yes song, wash your hands and many more children songs.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty & More Kids Rhymes (Junior Squad)
programme.desc: Humpty Dumpty sat on a wall, humpty dumpty had a great fall! Enjoy this nursery rhyme to find out what happens next to Humpty Dumpty, plus lots more fun filled cartoons.

programme.title: ABC Phonics Songs for Kids - Kids Baby Club
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhyme adventure that your little one will love! A is for apple, B is for baby, C is for cartoon and more from A to Z, helps preschoolers build their early vocabulary. Come join us as we sing along & dance in this popular learning video about phonics, alphabets, fruits, planets, numbers, abc, shapes, colors, 123 and more made easy and fun.

programme.title: Road Rangers Car Songs
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes like finger family, twinkle twinkle, wheels on the bus, five little monkeys and more songs on friendship, family bonds, problem solving! Come join the Road Rangers vehicles like the ambulance, fire truck, tow truck, garbage truck and learn the numbers, abc, shapes, colors and more made easy and fun in this popular kids original transportation show.

programme.title: Oh My Genius - Learn Colors and Numbers (Learning Videos for Kids)
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Zeek & Friends Non-Stop
programme.desc: Zeek and Friends is a nonstop playlist with fun & educational nursery rhymes videos, where the cartoon cars go on an adventure through the cartoon town. Children will watch and learn our other popular & kids friendly songs like rain rain go away, if you are happy and you know it, twinkle twinkle little star, finger family, and more cartoon transportation rhymes and songs for babies.

programme.title: Phonics, ABC & Kids Learning Videos - Bob The Train
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Bob the Train is here to make your learning time fun and easy. So what are we waiting for kids? Enjoy the video and don't forget to sing along with your friend Bob!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by Swat-Bots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff. Griff takes them deep beneath the Big City.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: In the park, Mr. Boyd is organizing a special toy drive to help children in need. When Baby Bop feels unsure about donating her toys, Barney and his friends come together to show her the joy of sharing and how it can make a difference, particularly in someone else's life.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children discuss the various ways to cool off on a hot day, especially with a nice cold drink of water or some ice cream. programme.title: Lifeline: Pearl Harbor's Unknown Hero
programme.desc: Narrated by actor Gary Sinise, LIFELINE: PEARL HARBOR'S UNKNOWN HERO tells the story of how U.S. Navy sailor Joe George became an unlikely hero when the Japanese attacked Pearl Harbor in Hawaii on December 7, 1941, and how he was recognized with a Bronze Medal for his actions more than 70 years later.A USS Vestal crewman, Joe was not your model navy sailor. He fought both inside and outside the boxing ring, liked his beer a little too much at times, and had a stubborn and defiant streak that often left him at odds with his superior officers and, once in a while, got him thrown in the brig. But on that Day of Infamy, Joe did something extraordinary. He became one of Americas first heroes of WWII.Ignoring a direct order to cut the lines from the USS Vestal, which was moored alongside the burning and sinking USS Arizona, the sailor made a crucial decision that saved six lives and impacted future generations. Joe could see that the crewmen were injured badly, trapped, waving, and pleading for help as fire raged on the Arizona's deck beneath them. He found a weighted heaving line and threw it toward the men, who secured the line. One by one, they began to crawl over to the USS Vestal, hand over hand, and more than 50 feet above the water, feeling the heat from the flames on their skin. More than a thousand Arizona crewmen died during the attack, with only 335 sailors surviving that day, including the six that Joe rescued.Joe was never recognized for his actions until the men he saved from the USS Arizona (Lauren Bruner and Donald Stratton) took it upon themselves to see he received the award he deserved. With the support of Stratton's son Randy, and George's daughter Joe Ann Taylor, the men of the USS Arizona took their mission all the way to the Oval Office, the Pentagon and Capitol Hill. They were determined to complete one final mission as USS Arizona crewmen.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: As the Ice Age glaciers melted, European civilization was born and with it, so was art. From the Stone Age came prehistoric art: mysterious tombs, mighty megaliths, and vivid cave paintings. Then the Egyptians and the Greeks laid the foundations of Western art creating a world of magical gods, massive pyramids, sun-splashed temples, and ever-more-lifelike statues.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: The Romans gave Europe its first taste of a common culture and awe-inspiring art. From its groundbreaking architecture to its statues, mosaics, and frescos, Rome engineered bigger and better than anyone before. At its peak, the Roman Empire was a society of unprecedented luxury, with colossal arenas for entertaining the masses and giant monuments to egotistical emperors. And then it fell.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe
programme.desc: After Rome fell, Europe spent a thousand years in its Middle Ages. Its art shows how the light of civilization flickered in monasteries and on Europes fringes: Christian Byzantium, Moorish Spain, and pagan Vikings. Then, around A.D. 1000, Europe rebounded. The High Middle Ages brought majestic castles, radiant Gothic cathedrals, and exquisite art that dazzled the faithful and the secular alike.

programme.title: Since: The Bombing of Pan Am Flight 103
programme.desc: Terrorism is seen as a present-day epidemic, but the families of the 270 victims of Pan Am Flight 103 have lived with it for decades. Bound together by tragedy when a bomb ripped the New York-bound 747 jumbo jet into pieces over Lockerbie, Scotland just before Christmas in 1988, the Flight 103 families faced one traumatic injustice after another. From the early days when an unprepared U.S. government left the relatives to fend for themselves against a greedy, once-iconic airline, to the modern era, when the only man convicted of the crime was set free in a backdoor oil deal with Libyas infamous dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, the families refused to go down without a fight, harnessing the power of the media in their war for truth and justice.SINCE: THE BOMBING OF PAN AM FLIGHT 103 is a feature length documentary that tells the emotional story of some of these first victims of terrorism, who proved that ordinary people can accomplish extraordinary feats in the wake of politically-fueled mass murder.

programme.title: America's Secret War
programme.desc: While the United States was publicly engaged in the Vietnam War, a secret military operation under the command of the CIA was being waged in the neighboring nation of Laos. At a concealed airbase in the heart of the country, the CIA trained an army of allied guerilla fighters to destroy enemy supply lines. AMERICA'S SECRET WAR uncovers the history of this covert mission.

programme.title: A Company of Heroes
programme.desc: They were the other Band of Brothers. A Company of Heroes features interviews with many of the men not focused on in the book Band of Brothers by Stephen Ambrose or in the television mini-series by the same name. Never before seen video and photos are also included in this film.
